danger_signals.visual_form: Animated sprite monsters (Eggplant Wizards, Reapers, etc.) with distinct idle/attack poses
Hearts meter in top-left corner diminishing/turning red
danger_signals.meaning: Pit is vulnerable; sustained damage will cause death

danger_signals.visual_form: Pit's sprite changes to immobilized eggplant form
danger_signals.meaning: Temporary incapacitation; loss of mobility and combat capability

danger_signals.visual_form: Non-scrolling rooms with branching corridors and dark/confined spaces
danger_signals.meaning: Increased complexity and gatekeeper boss proximity

danger_signals.visual_form: Large multi-form sprite with snake hair and stone-gaze attack
danger_signals.meaning: Ultimate threat; requires three sacred treasures to defeat

safety_signals.visual_form: Distinct door sprites leading to separate rooms
safety_signals.meaning: Access to safe zones: stores, hot springs, god's chambers, training chambers

safety_signals.visual_form: Visually distinct interior room with thermal sprites
safety_signals.meaning: Full health restoration; safe respite from combat

safety_signals.visual_form: Small heart items floating after enemy defeat
safety_signals.meaning: Health recovery opportunity; enemy elimination creates safety window

safety_signals.visual_form: Flying soldier sprite freed from stone statues
safety_signals.meaning: Ally reinforcement in boss battles; increased combat capability

safety_signals.visual_form: Unique treasure sprites obtained after boss defeats
safety_signals.meaning: Progress toward sky temple access; increased power state

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Divine palace/sky temple imagery; light-associated aesthetics
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Skyworld stage with upward-climbing levels; sky temple finale; god's chambers provide blessing mechanics

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Snake/serpent imagery; stone-gaze curse; monstrous hybrid form
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Underworld creatures (monsters, eggplant wizards, reapers) serve as minions; enemy variety increases in Underworld stage
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Underworld stage with downward-climbing levels; dark/cavernous visual aesthetic; fortress labyrinths; petrification/stone elements

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Store sprites; merchant chambers with transaction interfaces
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Black markets and treasure stores; heart-currency economy; haggle mechanics (FDS version uses microphone input)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Dark vertical climbing levels; stone architecture; underground caverns; increasing enemy density as descent progresses
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pit moves upward against gravity; Medusa's minions actively patrol and attack; fortress labyrinths become more complex

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Side-scrolling levels; outdoor/surface aesthetic; mixed terrain with platforms and obstacles
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Horizontal movement emphasis; moderate enemy encounters; transitional complexity between underworld and sky

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Upward-climbing vertical levels; celestial architecture; light-themed sprite work; sky palace imagery
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pit climbs toward divine realm; enemy patterns become more aggressive; final fortress preparation begins

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Scrolling shooter aesthetic; Medusa sprite dominates screen; transformation from platformer to vertical bullet-dodging gameplay
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pit must evade Medusa's attacks using three sacred treasures; no platforming—pure combat reflex test; eyeball revelation on defeat (NES version)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Full hearts bar; equipped power-up visual indicators (Protective Crystal glow, Flaming Arrows sprite variant, Sacred Bow model change)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enhanced combat capability; power-ups only function above health thresholds; score multiplier active

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Hearts meter near-empty; red coloration; Pit sprite may show damage animation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Power-ups disabled; increased vulnerability; one hit often results in death

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss defeat triggers treasure sprite appearance; visual fanfare; treasure added to inventory screen
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Stage progression enabled; sky temple becomes accessible; narrative milestone reached

environmental_storytelling.example: Underworld forces Pit downward then upward (struggle against evil); Skyworld forces continuous upward climb (ascension toward divinity); final temple is accessible only with three treasures (earned struggle)

Underworld features stone-based enemies and petrification themes (Medusa's curse aesthetic); Overworld has balanced mix; Skyworld features divine/angelic enemy variants—visual progression from corruption to purity

Stores and black markets indicate commerce exists despite chaos; god's chambers show Palutena's active intervention; training chambers suggest warrior culture; treasure rooms show wealth/power acquisition
Each boss defeat yields unique treasure sprite; collection visually manifests as power accumulation; sky temple door only opens with all three—visual gate mechanic
Shift from platforming to maze-solving signals increased danger/complexity; tool requirement (check sheet, torch, pencil) indicates hostile terrain; gatekeeper bosses guard progression

Transition from platformer to scrolling shooter visually and mechanically signals departure from normal world state into supernatural/divine confrontation; Medusa's boss arena has unique visual grammar

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Idle pose; limited sprite animation; ready stance for combat
Sprite transitions to airborne form; extended hang-time possible if A button held; Y-speed increases/decreases based on input (fine-tuned flight control)
Aim direction changes based on facing; rapid-fire possible via duck-jump exploit; multiple arrows on-screen simultaneously
Knockback push (5 pixels typically left, rarely right); invulnerability frames; health meter decrements; sprite may flash red
Sprite changes to immobilized eggplant form; cannot move or shoot; temporary incapacitation lasting several seconds
Pursues Pit with arcing attack pattern; attempts to land eggplant curse; sprite animation shows deliberate targeting
Fires invisible sight-detection sprites (tile $5F, normally blank); alternates high/low firing pattern; continues throwing if detection sprites don't hit obstacles
Sprite vanishes with death animation; heart item spawns; brief invulnerability window for Pit
Multi-phase attack patterns; larger sprite than normal enemies; arena confined to non-scrolling fortress room; defeat required to progress
Transforms sprite during fight; shoots projectiles in scroll-shooter stage; requires all three sacred treasures to damage; stone-gaze attack threatens instant loss state

notes: Kid Icarus uses a tri-stage world structure (Underworld, Overworld, Skyworld) that visually and mechanically communicates faction conflict: Medusa's dark forces (stone, petrification, monsters) versus Palutena's light (sky, divine chambers, sacred treasures). Danger is signaled through enemy sprites and architectural confinement (fortress labyrinths); safety through door-based chamber access and consumable hearts. The final stage genre shift (platformer to shooter) is a unique world-state manifestation indicating supernatural confrontation. Regional differences (FDS vs NES) primarily affect audio and menu systems rather than core visual/behavioral communication. Health threshold gates for power-ups create emergent resource management visible through UI and sprite variant swaps.
